title: Transport-hint parity E2E uses /reset as a normal turn instead of an ordinary text turn
source: current-session live-stack parity-fixture revert-reverify + focused canary + broad assistant-package E2E

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed c5ddf562 fix (a new tests/e2e/assistant/conversation_isolation_test.go +243 exact-key snapshot/reset/restore harness plus its adversarial isolation test, and tests/e2e/assistant/transport_hint_parity_test.go +17/-1 that swaps the stale /reset fixture for an ordinary text turn transportHintParityTurnText="/weather in barcelona" guarded by a requireNormalParityTurn sentinel rejecting the reset short circuit); test/regression were RE-VERIFIED live this session — the parity-fixture revert-reverify (RED: reverting transportHintParityTurnText to "/reset" makes the live parity test FAIL at transport_hint_parity_test.go:157 'hint="web" parity fixture reached the /reset short circuit', UNIT_RED_REVERT_EXIT=1; GREEN: byte-exact git checkout HEAD restore returns parity + isolation to PASS, UNIT_GREEN_RESTORE_EXIT=0) plus the broader assistant package (67 PASS in package order; the only 2 FAIL are foreign buildvcs in intent_replay_test.go, DI-073-004-01); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews (test-support only, pure exact-key isolation, clean disposable-stack teardown, good-neighbor); security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation (state-transition-guard PASS, artifact-lint exit 0).

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in c5ddf562. The parity E2E previously sent Text: "/reset", which internal/assistant/facade.go short-circuits before any agent invocation (deletes the (user_id, transport) conversation, returns 'context reset.' with no assistant_turn_id), so two matching reset acknowledgements proved nothing about ordinary-turn parity. Fix: tests/e2e/assistant/transport_hint_parity_test.go (+17/-1) now uses an ordinary text turn (transportHintParityTurnText="/weather in barcelona") guarded by requireNormalParityTurn, which REJECTS the 'context reset.' short circuit and requires a real assistant_turn_id, then compares only contract-relevant non-volatile fields (shapeOnly zeroes transport_message_id/emitted_at/trace) with canonical response transport 'web'. New tests/e2e/assistant/conversation_isolation_test.go (+243) adds an exact-key snapshot/reset/restore harness addressing ONLY the (user_id, transport) primary key (no unqualified UPDATE/DELETE/truncate) plus the adversarial TestAssistantConversationIsolation_RestoresExactTargetAndPreservesNeighbor_Adversarial. Test-support-only change; no production facade/httpadapter/reset/transport-hint/dedup semantics touched. The separately-proven HTTP dedup defect is routed to BUG-069-004.

Current-session genuine re-verification (good-neighbor; block-wait wrapper on the shared suite lock, no foreign stack evicted, clean teardown). Live parity-fixture revert-reverify: RED — reverting transportHintParityTurnText to "/reset" makes the live-stack TestAssistantTransportHintParity_WebAndMobileShareResponseShape FAIL at transport_hint_parity_test.go:157 ('hint="web" parity fixture reached the /reset short circuit; parity requires an ordinary text turn'), UNIT_RED_REVERT_EXIT=1 (the real facade returned 'context reset.' with no assistant_turn_id). GREEN — byte-exact git checkout HEAD -- tests/e2e/assistant/transport_hint_parity_test.go restores it and the focused canary (parity + exact-row isolation) returns PASS: TestAssistantConversationIsolation_...Adversarial PASS + TestAssistantTransportHintParity_... PASS (18.36s), UNIT_GREEN_RESTORE_EXIT=0, tree clean. This is the independent focused canary (TP-BUG073004-014) run BEFORE the broad package. Evidence in report.md 'RED: Revert-Reverify' + 'GREEN: Revert-Reverify restore + focused canary'.

Current-session broader regression leg: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant -> 67 PASS, 2 FAIL, 13 SKIP in package order; the repaired TestAssistantConversationIsolation_...Adversarial and TestAssistantTransportHintParity_... (+ its adversarial TestAssistantTransportHintParity_AdversarialDivergentBodiesDetected) are all GREEN, and every neighboring in-boundary assistant flow is GREEN. The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing FOREIGN build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_ReproducesRouteAndToolCallsWithoutSideEffects + TestIntentReplayE2E_UnknownTraceIDExits2 -> replay CLI go build fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false', intent_replay_test.go:187/:224) in the spec-069 intent-replay subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree packet-only; only the two E2E test files), dispositioned DI-073-004-01 (G051/G095). PKG_E2E_EXIT=1 attributable ONLY to the foreign failures. Full Go units (FULL_GO_UNITS_EXIT=0) and Python units (708 passed, FULL_PY_UNITS_EXIT=0) GREEN. No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. Bounded review: the fix is test-support only — it replaces a stale one-line fixture and adds one exact-key isolation harness reused by the parity test. No new production type, abstraction, provider registry, indirection, or fallback introduced; the isolation harness addresses only the (user_id, transport) primary key by design (design.md 'Data Safety'). Nothing to simplify — the change reduces test fragility and shared-identity coupling rather than adding surface.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-support-only change; zero production-image / Compose / container-lifecycle / schema / NATS / migration changes. The isolation harness snapshots the exact (user_id, transport) row, resets only that key, and restores it (or restores-as-absent) in t.Cleanup on success OR failure — no global assistant_conversations mutation. The disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit in all three live E2E legs (all containers/volumes/network Removed — good-neighbor). No shared-fixture coupling introduced beyond the exact-key isolation declared in the Change Boundary.

executionHistory.note: Exact-candidate security review returned PASS for merge, build, and deploy. The fix preserves bearer/session privacy (isolation is limited to the single SST-bound shared identity row and restores the exact prior value on success or failure; no global conversation-table mutation).

Exact-candidate diagnostic returned PASS for fast-forward merge, build, and deploy while preserving explicit skips and nonterminal certification. This session's validate-owned reconciliation ran the governance guards against the reconciled packet (state-transition-guard PASS, failedGateIds []; artifact-lint exit 0) and stamps terminal certification only in the promote commit after the planning-truth commit (G088).

Exact-candidate source, test, and documentation consistency passed; delivery completion was blocked only by packet governance. This session's audit reconciliation (report.md '### Audit Evidence') verdict SHIP: the parity-fixture revert-reverify is a non-fabricated live RED->GREEN proof, the change is isolated to the committed c5ddf562 + packet, no production reset/transport-hint semantics were weakened, and the 2 broader-suite failures are foreign buildvcs (DI-073-004-01).

observations.summary: Production reset and telemetry-only transport-hint semantics are correct; the live revert-reverify proves the repaired parity test rejects the reset short circuit and requires an ordinary traced turn. The separate HTTP dedup defect is owned by BUG-069-004.
observations.followUpAction: None. Packet is tested, reconciled, and certified done by validate.
